faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Flatlands, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Ant control services in Flatlands typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the type of ant species involved. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Flatlands homes?
faqs.answer: Flatlands residents most frequently encounter pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning in this neighborhood's many older wooden homes, as they can cause structural damage. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method.
